From: Elena Morales <elena@finblue.com>
To: Ava Chen <ava@redwood.com>
Date: Tue, 24 Nov 2026 09:12:00 -0800
Subject: Request: quick confirmation on log sampling results

Hi Ava,

Thanks for the update over the phone this morning. The security team here needs a concise written confirmation that Redwood's log sampling and hash reconciliation for the 2026-11-23 incident did not show any access to FinBlue customer records.

Can you include:
- Short description of the sampling method used
- The time window examined
- Whether any customer identifiers or PII were present in the sample
- Any attachments or output we can use for our audit (hash manifest or sample csv)

We are aiming to close our internal audit ticket by COB tomorrow and this statement will suffice for now. If you need to loop in an independent reviewer, let us know.

Best,
Elena Morales
Head of Security Operations
FinBlue

--...

Cc: legal@gamma-analytics.com
Date: Fri, 20 Nov 2026 09:12:00 -0800
Subject: Liability cap - initial redlines

Ben — thanks for the demo last week. Our legal team reviewed the MSA/order form and pushed back primarily on the limitation of liability and the consequential damage carve-outs. High level asks:

- Liability cap to be equal to the greater of (i) fees paid in prior 12 months or (ii) $1M; Gamma prefers a firm floor rather than a multiple.
- Consequential damages waiver needs a carve-out for claims arising from data breach and IP infringement.
- Carve-outs for gross negligence and willful misconduct to be explicit (no cap).

I've attached our redlines (Gamma_MSA_redline_v3.docx) and a short liability summary. Can you confirm Redwood's position and timeline? We ar...

Team —

Parkview hit us this morning after the private cutover at ~03:30 PDT. They’re seeing intermittent application-level session resets and 502s when traffic egresses through their inspection firewall. Customer trace shows a path that sometimes traverses the inspection appliance on return and sometimes bypasses it, which is causing TCP RSTs / stale conntrack entries.

Symptoms from Parkview:
- App logs: short-lived TCP sessions, abrupt RSTs ~30–90s after open.
- User impact: intermittent request failures to the inference endpoint (about 6–8% o...

Subject: Re: Proposed Redwood agreement — indemnity and warranty requests

Ben —

Thanks for the draft. Legal here at ClearPath reviewed and we have two substantive asks that block signature on our side:

1) Indemnity: we need the vendor to indemnify ClearPath for third-party IP claims related to the Service (not just direct infringement), and the clause should be unlimited or at least uncapped for IP claims.

2) Warranty & Remedies: we need a full warranty covering accuracy of model outputs for a 12 month period and a right to terminate and receive a refund if material defects persist.

We appreciate that these may be nonstandard; please escalate if Redwood needs exec approva...
